thumbnail.composition: Hero Subject (70-90% frame), Split Screen (Rich vs Poor)
thumbnail.color_grading: High contrast, dark background, neon/gold highlights

logo.style: Cinematic 3D emblem or hyper-realistic persona portrait
logo.prompt: square YouTube channel logo icon, cinematic hyper-realistic emblem of a glowing golden broken heart mended with gold kintsugi lines OR a dignified elderly woman face in shadows. Deep crimson red #8B0000 and gold #D4AF37 accents, moody lighting, elegant minimalist design. NO text, NO white background, NO padding, fills 95% of frame, 4k resolution, masterpiece.

banner.elements: Mansion interiors, night cityscapes, rain on windows
banner.prompt: ultra-wide cinematic YouTube channel banner 16:9, luxurious dark mahogany living room in deep shadows, glowing golden fireplace light reflecting on polished marble floor. Heavy rain on a panoramic window overlooking a blurred glowing city skyline at night. Melancholic moody atmosphere, high contrast, dark blue #2C3E50 and gold #E5C158 color grading. Photorealistic, 8k.

video_look.color_grading: Desaturated/Teal for trauma, Warm/Gold for triumph
video_look.movement: Slow Ken Burns (zoom in/out), Parallax depth

text_overlay.font_specs: Montserrat Black, White #FFFFFF fill, Yellow #FFFF00 highlights

intro.description: Cold open directly into the traumatic hook over dark B-roll. No logo animation.

outro.layout: End screen with 2 video boxes and center subscribe circle over a blurred dark background
outro.audio_cue: Verbal CTA matching visuals ('clica no vídeo que tá aparecendo na tela')

music.setup: Dark ambient, ticking clocks, low drone

brand_dna.brand_signature: A assinatura visual do canal é pautada pelo contraste entre a escuridão do sofrimento e o brilho do triunfo. Há uma dependência de imagens estáticas ou com movimento Ken Burns lento que transmitem melancolia, solidão e luxo frio. As cores predominantes orbitam o preto, o vermelho-sangue e o dourado, refletindo temas de traição e riqueza. A ausência de rostos falantes direciona toda a tensão emocional para a voz narrativa e as legendas cinéticas garrafais no centro da tela. É um estilo 'audiobook cinematográfico' que hipnotiza pela lentidão visual enquanto o áudio acelera a tensão.
templates: The Document Drop: Close up of hands placing a glowing legal paper on marble
The Window Watcher: Silhouette of the protagonist looking at rain/city lights
The Hidden Observer: POV from inside a dark closet looking out to a bright room
anti_patterns: NO cheerful pastel color palettes (pink, baby blue)
NO complex logo animations lasting more than 2 seconds
NO illegible thin/cursive fonts on screen
